speakers.title: ADDITIONAL DETAIL  Net Accrued Performance Revenues (“NAPR”) are presented net of performance compensation and excludes Performance Revenues rea liz ed but not yet distributed  as of the reporting date and clawback amounts, if any, which are disclosed in the 10 - K/Q

speakers.title: Net Realizations   is presented on a segment basis and is the sum of Realized Principal Investment Income and Realized Performance  Revenues (which refers to Realized Performance Revenues excluding Fee Related Performance Revenues), less Realized Performanc e  Compensation (which refers to Realized Performance Compensation excluding Fee Related Performance Compensation and Equity - Based  Performance Compensation)
